ERA/remittance for CLM-2025-00017 shows denial N418 with RARC N657: claim submitted to incorrect payer/services under delegated capitation arrangement. Patient Lewis, Angela; DOS 2025-10-12; plan Medicaid Managed Care through Pacific Health Alliance with delegated group Community Care Network. Lines 99214, 90471, and 90715 paid $0.00; remaining balance $1,450.00. This is not a clinical/coding/authorization denial; payer is indicating responsibility belongs with the delegated capitated entity. Route/resubmit to Community Care Network/correct delegated payer and do not transfer to patient or pursue medical-necessity appeal at this stage. Deadline noted 2026-03-08.
